name: handy-go
description: Handy Go - On-demand home services platform connecting customers with skilled workers

scripts.backend:dev: pnpm --filter @handy-go/shared build && NODE_ENV=development LOCAL_DEV_MODE=true pnpm --filter @handy-go/api-gateway exec tsx src/index.ts
scripts.backend:dev:watch: pnpm --filter @handy-go/shared build && NODE_ENV=development LOCAL_DEV_MODE=true pnpm --filter @handy-go/api-gateway run dev
scripts.backend:dev:full: pnpm --filter @handy-go/shared build && concurrently "pnpm --filter @handy-go/api-gateway exec tsx src/index.ts" "pnpm -r --parallel --filter './backend/services/*' exec tsx src/index.ts"
scripts.backend:dev:full:watch: pnpm --filter @handy-go/shared build && concurrently "pnpm --filter @handy-go/shared run dev" "pnpm --filter @handy-go/api-gateway run dev" "pnpm -r --parallel --filter './backend/services/*' run dev"

author: Handy Go Team
